target_name: SolaceAGI QA Evidence Sync — POST Accepted (Northstar)
context: Northstar contract: /api/v1/qa-evidence/sync accepts inspector push results. Currently in demo mode: endpoint accepts writes without auth (in-memory store, not persistent). KNOWN_LIMITATION: Auth-gating for sync endpoint is Phase 2 (production hardening). Michael Bolton: evidence without a chain of custody is hearsay — auth gate WILL be added before production. For now verify the endpoint accepts valid payloads with 200 ok response containing {ok:true, project}. The evidence_hash sealing happens client-side in the inspector runner before sync.
